_meta.purpose: Per-post expected PDF pole-symbol position (x,y in flipped page pt) for LC posts 1-20. Enables a position gate that measures Poste-symbol placement (layer B) in isolation from the label-LSQ calibration (which currently compensates for placement errors). See .planning/quick/260603-n4k-debug-lc-post-symbol-assignment-collapse/260603-n4k-MILESTONE-SCOPE.md (Phase 1).
_meta.source: Seeded from the parser's anchorX/anchorY (Numero_Poste label centroid), which is computed independently of the pole-symbol assignment and equals the accepted pole position for every correctly-placed post (28/31 have |xy-anchor|=0). Posts 9/10/11 currently DIVERGE (their x,y collapsed onto wrong/shared symbols) — their truth here is their CORRECT anchor, so the gate flags the collapse. Refine individual values from the detail sheets if a pole centroid is known to differ from its number label.
_meta.scope: posts 1-20 only (the milestone target). Posts 21-31 are a separate rigid-offset issue and post 30/31 anchors are themselves collapsed (1025,416) — excluded here.
